text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So, our Fleetfoot Festival training camp has officially started, but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Phew... Damn it. This isn't enough.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Brian! There you are.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Rudolf... What do you want? If it's about archery training, we still
have some time until it starts.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm? Well, if you can get ready with lightning speed, then yes, but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Then that's what I'll do. Leave me alone.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe that in between the blood-boiling battles of the
Kikuka Sho, the autumn Tenno Sho, the Japan Cup, and the Arima
Kinen, I'm wasting away out here in the sticks.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: How am I supposed to sharpen my fangs like this?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Brian...

text_block_list.name: Dance Teacher
text_block_list.text: Good work, everyone! Let's call it a day here.

text_block_list.name: The Three
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Dance Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Curren, your moves have improved a lot. Yukino, try and relax your
shoulders a bit.

text_block_list.name: Dance Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Especially when it's your turn to take center stage. That part is the
highlight of the performance, so enjoy it, okay?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: O-okay! I'll practice 'til I'm jump'n and jiv'n the whole time!

text_block_list.name: Dance Teacher
text_block_list.text: And City... Hmm... Your dancing is beautiful, but...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But?

text_block_list.name: Dance Teacher
text_block_list.text: Hmm... No, never mind. You're doing great just as you are!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Really? Well, as long as it's pretty, that's all that matters.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Okay. So you received the night-time leave documents. Thank
you for the swift response, Air Groove. Bye now.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: President! Oh... Sorry!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Not to worry, I've just finished on the phone. Can I help you with
something?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Well... I'm not sure if it's anything worth bringing up yet, but...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I see. So the team isn't meshing so well on your side either. Thank you
for notifying me, Curren.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I've actually been thinking of some measures for that very issue, and
the preparations have just been put in place.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow, really?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I will coax Brian into coming with us on my end, so I'd like to task
you with bringing Gold City and Yukino Bijin along on yours.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, they even have fireworks! I'd heard this autumn festival was big,
and it's true!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
The person from the inn said this was a pretty lively festival for the
area. Ahh, the food stalls smell so good.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
B-but... should we really be enjoy'n a festival right now? We didn't
come here to dilly-dally...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We're starting with the basics, Yukino Bijin. Our task is to make sure
people enjoy the festival, so it is vital that we see one with our own
eyes. Now...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Brian, which stall would you like to try first? I like local items that
have a regional flavor. Perhaps I'll buy some for the student council as
thanks for filling in during my absence.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You did enough work to tide them over for your absence and more,
though. Whatever. I'm hungry. Let's just find something to eat.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The lanterns on that shop are so cute and colorful! The lighting is nice
and soft, and if I stand right about here and look over my shoulder...
Mm-hm! The perfect shot! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Haha, true. I'll take it for you later, Curren. What about you, Yukino?
Don't be shy if there's anywhere you wanna check out too.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Umm, in that case, the yo-yo fishing? Ah, but that's too childish, isn't
it? Haha!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Why not? Sounds good to me. The designs are usually pretty cute
too. Besides... that's such a Yukino thing to do! I'll snap a pic of that
too.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Gee, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Local Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
E-excuse me! You're Curren, right? Sorry to approach you out of the
blue! It's just I... I follow you on Umastagram!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, thank you! I'm glad you came to speak to me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Local Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
You're training for the ceremonial dance at the Fleetfoot Festival
right now, aren't you? Ooh, I just can't wait! I'll definitely come and
see it!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, I'll see you there! Oh, and please use the tags "#Curren" and
"#CeremonialDance" when you post about it, okay? ♪ I'll be
searching for people's comments! ☆

text_block_list.name: Local Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Okaaay! We're gonna make sure you're trending! Thank you for
talking to me in your private time! I'll leave you to it now!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Your post about the ceremonial dance went pretty viral, huh.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
This whole dance thing is a bit different from my usual vibe, so I think
everyone's just surprised. I'm glad the reactions have been mostly
positive on the whole though! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: And with that, I think I've done a good job of playing my role.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What do you mean, your role?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Like, my part? I think I was chosen as a mascot this time around. My
image doesn't exactly shout "history" or "tradition" or anything,
y'know?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So I thought I'd do what I do best and make sure this festival goes
viral. I'm serious about the dance, though. I wanna surprise people
with that.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Or at least, that's what I thought would be cutest! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Curren... Oh. Wow, you're amazing.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Seriously... amazing.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Mmm, what a wonderful aroma! The scent of sizzling sauce is truly
exceptional. Brian, shall we go to the yakisoba stand next? I bet
that's the "sauce" of that scent...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I don't want any. Not enough meat. That won't fire up my body at all.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm, if you say sauce. Let's go down that path over there then! They
had skewered meat and vegetables on the grill. I'm sure we'll find
something to your taste.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch... What is this? Trying to act like my older sister? As if you're
doing me a favor?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Not at all. I don't intend to challenge Biwa Hayahide in that regard.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I just... want you to enjoy yourself. However you see fit.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Just have fun, Brian. That goes for this festival, the Fleetfoot Festival,
and the archery show with me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That's all I wish for you.
